title: panicum bartlettii
intro: Panicum bartlettii, also known as Bartlett's panic grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Panicum bartlettii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the leaves and stems of the plant.
